title: NexFlow Agents Manifest
description: Stable AI agent identity declarations. Projects without ActorSet may retain legacy mixed participant entries during migration; deprecated behavior and access fields remain schema-valid only for compatibility.

permissions.description: Deprecated compatibility field. Permission selection belongs to AgentDefinitionSet and authorization effects remain authoritative in PermissionSet.

capabilities.description: Deprecated compatibility field. Requested capabilities belong to AgentDefinitionSet and do not grant technical or policy access.

contextAccess.description: Deprecated compatibility field. Requested context sources belong to AgentDefinitionSet while ContextSet remains authoritative for source policy.

memoryAccess.description: Deprecated compatibility field. Requested memory scopes belong to AgentDefinitionSet while MemorySet remains authoritative for retention and access policy.

autonomyLevel.description: Deprecated compatibility field. Requested autonomy belongs to AgentDefinitionSet and may only be narrowed by project, task, workflow, human-control, and runtime constraints.

providerPreferences.description: Deprecated compatibility field. Provider-neutral model selection belongs to ModelProfileSet referenced by AgentDefinitionSet.

extensions.description: Deprecated compatibility field. Requested extension components belong to AgentDefinitionSet; ExtensionSet remains authoritative for extension declarations.
